subcodes.first_line: The Essence of Eternity, in the Temple of Glory, doth warble in sweetest Persian melodies: O beloved of God, detach thyself from all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کینونت بقا در هیکل بها بالحان فارسی احلی میفرماید ای حبیب الله فارغ شو از کل
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual transformation
